sampleHooks: Comment "Fitness" and I'll send you the full guide 👇

items.title:
Comment "Fitness" and I'll send you the full guide 👇

Claude just killed personal trainers.

You can now connect Claude directly to your Apple Health and Google Calendar so it builds personalized workout plans based on your actual data.

Here's how to set it up in 30 seconds:

1. Go to Claude → Projects → Create New Project and name it Fitness Coach
2. Paste in the master prompt under Instructions
3. Open the Claude app on iPhone → Settings → Permissions and turn on Read for Health and Calendar

Now Claude pulls from your real data (steps, sleep, heart rate) and builds you a full workout plan automatically slotted into your calendar.

The craziest part? Claude actually adjusts based on the data. Only slept 4 hours? It swaps your heavy lifting day for active recovery and updates your calendar instantly.

#ai #claude #fitness #applehealth #aitools
